roa.docketEntryComment: TS WHET PROB SHD REM REV AP
TS WHET PROB SHD REM REV AP

/MTR-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT STIP/REV/SP 16 MONTHS, LOWER TERM///X:DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 581 DAYS///X:COUNTY JAIL, 290  SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 871 DAYS,//STATES/VF5:$200//DEF:ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE ON 10-17-97/
MO W/D PLEA NG GRTD;ADV/PERS WVS CONSTL RTS;PLD G CT1-664/212,5(B)PC/FCRT MKES FNDGS;REF APD/PSR;CONT 11/1/94 AT 9AM IN S25 FOR SENTCRT GRTS DA MO STRK ALL ALLEGS
CONT'D TS WHET PROB SHD REM REV APD/SUPP:10-03-97/SHER//H1:971003/0900/S22
/MTR-APD/REVSA 07-20-95//REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ 36 DAYS/ADDL CTS 36/ALC/DTC//PROB EXT:03-13-98/
CONT'D TS WHET PROB SHD REM REV APD/SUPP 11-30-95/S22//H1:951130/0900/S22
TRANSF TO D27 FOR PTC F/W
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//FAW/DEFT ARR/TN1//PC:941004/1400/S22/TR:941011/0930/S22
